channel.title: Gdrp on Pryv
channel.description: Recent content in Gdrp on Pryv

item.title: Build38 and Pryv Team Up to Simplify Mobile Security and Privacy for Digital Health Companies
item.description: Lausanne/Switzerland, Munich/Germany 5th May, 2020 – The Swiss leading provider of privacy and personal data management software, Pryv, and Build38 GmbH, the global provider of mobile application protection solutions, announced a strategic collaboration to address the growing demand for security and privacy compliance for the Digital Health and InsurTech Industry. Security with app hardening and privacy-by-design backend are a top priority for Digital Health Providers Fraud, privacy violations, cyberattacks, unauthorized data collection, outlaw processing, and hacking of connected medical devices and mobile applications are just a few of the threats arising from the digitalization of the healthcare industry.

item.title: Rigorous GDPR Compliance Capability. Pryv.io, Data & Privacy, Managed
item.description: https://pryv.github.io/www/wp-content/uploads/2018/05/pryv-animation-fullhd-data-privacy-management-pryv.mp4 Pryv.io helps organizations manage personal and health data from creation, to storage, use and sharing. Our software comes with: A secure storage vault Dynamic consent management Complete auditing capability We: manage personal data from creation, to use, to sharing, archival and deletion. enable response to current and forthcoming privacy and data protection regulations accelerate time to market and reduce development cost of innovation So customer can: stay focused on their core business and innovation course create value on top of a solid foundation of privacy and data protection turn compliance investments into a differentiating advantage.
